products.name: iCharger 4512 DUO 12S DC Charger
products.descriptor: Dual-channel DC battery charger, up to 12S, 2800 W max output, 45 A per channel

evidence.snippet:
iCharger 4512 DUO 12S DC Charger
================================
Price:
Regular price $649.00
Regular price Sale price $649.00
Unit price /  per

The 4512 DUO uses advanced Synchronous buck-boost DC/DC converter technology, high power, a high current and high-performance power conversion circuit. The maximum charge power capacity is up to 2800W, the maximum charge/discharge current of a channel is up to 45A, and two channels in Synchronous Mode are up to 80A.
**Specifications**:
*   Input voltage range: 11-53VDC

evidence.snippet:

================================================

Regular price Sale price $349.00

The ISDT P30 is a dual-channel 8S charger capable of 1500W of output. Each channel can operate independently, putting out a maximum of 30A, or you can combine the two channels in parallel for synchronous balance charging at up to 50A.
